narrative: US military strikes on Iran and soft PPI data drive a broad dollar sell-off — DXY -0.40% as Fed hike odds retreat; USD/JPY at 162.12 remains anchored by +125bp carry despite geopolitical risk premium. NZD/USD leads G10 (+1.32% avg) on RBNZ-Fed divergence; gold steady -0.02%; equities +0.38%; VIX 15.7. Watch the next BoC meeting and Fed Musalem speech for policy guidance.
